title: Retro Patches
description: This pack tweaks a few textures and sounds as to closer how I imagine programmer art would've been today, including mob biome variants, and deepslate/netherrack sounds.
body:
Current changes made by the texture pack:
Changes deepslate to resemble programmer art style stone and stonebrick, as well as the ores
Changes deepslate sound to that of stone
Changes netherrack sound to that of stone
Changes pigs+chickens+cows to show only their default variant, in programmer art textures
Changes wolf sounds to pre 25w08a

Feel free to contact me if something you think fits in this pack should be added! Or if you find a way to change cow models, as the new ones have different models for the cold and warm variants, which is why some cows have missing horns
